description_long: This is a modern, multi-story bungalow with a flat, overhanging roof and open, cantilevered balconies on each level. The structure features large, floor-to-ceiling windows and glass railings, providing ample natural light and a sense of openness. The exterior is finished with a combination of light-colored concrete or stucco and wood paneling, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance. The interior layout is visible, showing a central staircase connecting the floors and open-plan living spaces. The building sits on a wooden platform that extends outward, possibly serving as a patio or deck. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a minimalist aesthetic.
description: A modern, multi-story bungalow with flat roof, open balconies, and large glass windows, featuring a mix of wood and concrete finishes. The design is sleek and minimalist with visible interior staircases and open-plan spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open balconies, central staircase, and a clear view of the interior layout.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cantilevered balconies, glass railings, and the overhanging flat roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back balconies, large windows, and the wooden platform base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a focus on the open-plan interior, visible staircase, and extended deck area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large floor-to-ceiling windows and glass railings
